message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Shared memory receiver behaviour

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EFEFEF
  BoxBorderColor #999999
  BoxBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #BDB76B
}

participant "Shared memory receiver" as SMR
participant "Semaphore coord" as SEMC
box "Coordination struct" #E6E6E6
  participant "Reader count var" as RC
  participant "locks_active" as LA
  participant "locks_leaving" as LL
  participant "Semaphore copy" as SC
end box
participant "Copy buff" as CB

== create ==
alt ["Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"]
  SMR -> SEMC : Create semaphore
end
SMR -> SEMC : wait
note over SEMC,CB
Writer sets up sharedmemory
Writer is ready
Writer inits it with the required number
end note
SMR -> RC : ok
SMR -> RC : reincrease
SMR -> SEMC : MMap coordination struct
SMR -> SC : Trylock copy semaphore

alt [fail]
  SMR <-- SC : Fail
  SMR -> SMR : Can't lock
else [success]
  SMR <-- SC : Success
  SMR -> CB : MMap copy buffer
  SMR -> SMR : read_flag to true
  SMR -> LL : Lock leaving[1]
  SMR -> RC : Signal reader ready
end
SMR -> SEMC : Close coordination semaphore file
SMR <-- SEMC : Success

== ready ==
SMR -> SMR : ready?
alt [finished flag set]
  SMR <-- SMR : False
else [has read current chunk]
  SMR -> LA : lock next chunk (reading)
  note over LA
Blocks until next
chunk is written
end note
  SMR -> LL : Release previous leaving
  SMR -> LA : Change active
  SMR -> SMR : reset read flag
  SMR -> CB : get chunk size
  SMR <-- CB : c_size
  SMR <-- SMR : c_size > 0
  SMR <-- SMR : True
end

alt [finished]
  note left of SMR
This is done before
actually returning
end note
  SMR -> SMR : set finished flag
  SMR -> LA : Release lock
end

== buff size ==
SMR -> SEMC : get buff_size from coord
SMR <-- SEMC : buff_size

== receive ==
note left of SMR
This is called after ready so I am already on the correct
chunk and it has data to read
end note
alt [read_flag_set or finished flag set]
  SMR <-- SMR : Fail
else
  SMR -> CB : Read data in current chunk
  SMR <-- CB : vector
  SMR -> SMR : set read flag
  SMR -> LL : lock leaving
  SMR -> LA : release active
  SMR <-- SMR : vector
end

== destructor ==
SMR -> SMR : Destroy
alt [not finished]
  alt [read_flag set]
    SMR -> LA : unlock
  else [read_flag false]
    SMR -> LL : unlock
  end
end
SMR -> RC : Notify left
SMR -> SMR : Unmap memory
SMR -> SMR : Close files

@enduml
```
